title: Pixel Garden App
desc: A journaling plant growth app with emotional storytelling.
details: Built with React Native, AsyncStorage, and custom growth logic. Focused on healing mechanics and progression.

title: Dark Pixel Art Pack
details: Includes tilesets, props, and character sprites with a grayscale palette and accent colors.

title: Portfolio Website
details: Built with React, Tailwind, and Framer Motion. Focus on UX and smooth animations.

title: Brand Identity Kit
details: Logo design, typography, color systems, and social templates for cohesive branding.
